items.name: Wooden Pirate Captain [Limb Bundle]
items.description:
Yarr! Lost your limbs to a sea monster? No problem. 🏴‍☠️

This full limb set replaces your arms with rusty iron hooks and your legs with sturdy wooden pegs wrapped in rope. Perfect for pirate captains, sailors, and wooden constructs.

🪵 Material: Wood & Rusty Metal ⚓ Style: Pirate / Nautical / Survivor

👇 Complete the look with my other items! https://www.roblox.com/groups/32723270/VesiVibes-Design
